_comment: Per-game recommended tweak configurations. 'match' holds lowercase name substrings used to identify a detected/selected game. Every 'id' must be a real tweak in tweak_catalog (a test enforces this). Recommending a tweak never applies it — the UI only pre-selects it for the confirmation modal.

recommended.why: Sends each shot packet instantly instead of batching — cuts peeker's-advantage lag.
Acknowledges packets immediately, pairing with Nagle-off for snappier netcode.
Reserves bandwidth headroom so background apps can't spike your ping mid-round.
Makes flick and micro-aim 1:1 and identical every session.
Forces true exclusive fullscreen for the lowest input lag.
Removes the Xbox capture overlay that silently costs frames.
Gives the game's threads more scheduler time under load.

notRecommended.why: Overkill for a light esports title — High Performance runs cooler for the same result.

recommended.why: Ability casts and clicks reach the server without batching delay.
Immediate ACKs keep last-hit and trade timings responsive.
Prioritizes game traffic so streams/downloads don't add lag.
Clears stale entries so you connect to the nearest server.
Consistent cursor movement for precise skill-shots.
Drops the background capture overhead.
Instant packet send is critical for CS2's sub-tick netcode.

Keeps your ping stable when the network is busy.
